title: Crispy Chicken Casserole
description: A Filipino-inspired casserole topped with crispy chicken, perfect for a satisfying dinner. This dish combines the crunch of crispy chicken with the comforting flavors of a classic casserole.
instructions: Cook the casserole mix according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, fry the chicken breast until crispy and golden brown.
In a large bowl, mix together the cooked casserole mix, coconut milk, sugar, salt, and black pepper.
Add the crispy fried onions on top of the casserole mix mixture.
Place the crispy fried chicken on top of the casserole.
Pour the herb butter over the chicken and casserole.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 20-25 minutes.
